ranking_rationale: sqrt=direct bit-trick+Newton-Raphson algorithmic template, rsqrt=shows exponent manipulation adaptation via setexp/exexp, frac=canonical local reinterpret/exexp/bitmask idioms, atanh=exexp/setexp/int32_to_float IEEE754 math and vConstFloatPrgm init pattern, sinh=odd-symmetry sign handling for cbrt(-x)=-cbrt(x)
